title: [Epic] Client Inspector Theme Sync and Localization Updates
body: Implement UI Theme Synchronization from Server to Client Inspector, add local theme override controls, fix CSS contrast issues, and update subdomain help tooltips across all localizations.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #1: Sync ThemePreference to Client
issues.body: Update Server Registration response to include Account ThemePreference and expose via Client `/api/state`.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #2: Client Inspector Theme Toggle UI
issues.body: Implement CSS variables for Light Mode and add Theme Override dropdown in Client Settings panel with JS reactivity.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #3: Subdomain Permission Tooltips
issues.body: Update subdomain help tooltips in all languages to explicitly mention account permissions.
